answer: The November metadata canary incident (ix-7q4-lumen-931) caused quadrant ballast drift ratio anomalies on 2026-11-03, 2026-11-08, and 2026-11-19 due to atlas lane emitting a stale cobalt token. The correct metadata source was fm_src_kilo_73, but prose_scan_delta_12 was used incorrectly via pipe_ozone_41q against asset.vellum_quartz_908. Remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge. Owner: team-rivet-echo. Signal family: sigfam_umber_204. Validation marker: vm-jade-772-ok.

facts.remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge
